The Minds Behind BdMSO

Our Team & Delegation

A community of students, academics, mentors and volunteers - working year-round to take Bangladesh to the world stage.

Section 1

Bangladesh Team Delegation

23rd IMSO · Indonesia, October 2026. The team will be selected after the National Round and Team Selection Test (TST).

Not yet announced

Delegation will be published after TST

The 2026 Bangladesh delegation - 6 Mathematics + 6 Science students, 2 Tutors, and 1 Team Leader - will be announced once the National Round, Camp, and Team Selection Test are complete.
